GET https://beeatlas.net/data/ecdysis.pa.description: Specimen records parquet file served from S3 via CloudFront. Columns: ecdysis_id, occurrenceID, longitude, latitude, year, month, scientificName, recordedBy, fieldNumber, genus, family, floralHost, county, ecoregion_l3, inat_observation_id, inat_host, inat_quality_grade

GET https://beeatlas.net/data/samples.pa.description: iNaturalist sample event records parquet file. Columns: observation_id, observer, date, lat, lon, specimen_count, sample_id, county, ecoregion_l3

GET https://beeatlas.net/data/counties.g.description: Washington state county boundaries GeoJSON. Feature property: NAME (county name string)

GET https://beeatlas.net/data/ecoregions.description: WA EPA Level 3 ecoregion boundaries GeoJSON. Feature property: NA_L3NAME (ecoregion name string)

Lambda invoke (inat).description: Manual or scheduled Lambda invocation to run iNaturalist pipeline only (nightly schedule: daily 08:00 UTC)

Lambda invoke (full).description: Manual or scheduled Lambda invocation to run all 5 pipelines (weekly schedule: Sunday 10:00 UTC)
